description: Keep the global NeoDunggeunmo UI font, but restore Monaco editor surfaces to Bitburner's code font stack.
scope: index.html CSS override for Monaco editor only

verification.expectedVisualChange: Monaco script editor code text should use JetBrainsMono/Courier-style code font while the surrounding UI remains NeoDunggeunmo.
knownRemaining: Terminal, tail windows, buttons, and general UI intentionally keep NeoDunggeunmo.
